campaign: New Dawn '26 — Famakin Mubaraq Olanrewaju "DOPEMAN" for LSUG President, LAUTECH
instructions: 50 multiple-choice trivia questions for a giveaway/quiz to help voters retain key campaign facts. Each question has 4 options; "answer" gives the correct one.

questions.question: What is the full name of the LSUG presidential candidate behind the New Dawn campaign?

Which New Dawn promise is about accountability for LSUG's finances?
options: Publish every kobo of LSUG income and spending, every semester.
questions.answer: Publish every kobo of LSUG income and spending, every semester.

questions.question: Which New Dawn promise ensures students are consulted before new costs are added?
options: Hold a town-hall before any new levy or fee is proposed.
questions.answer: Hold a town-hall before any new levy or fee is proposed.

questions.question: Which New Dawn promise addresses equipment across colleges?
options: Fight for functional lab, studio, and workshop equipment in every college.
Buy new buses for every college.
questions.answer: Fight for functional lab, studio, and workshop equipment in every college.

questions.question: Which New Dawn promise addresses harassment and welfare complaints?
options: Set up a real, confidential harassment and welfare report line.
questions.answer: Set up a real, confidential harassment and welfare report line.

questions.question: Which New Dawn promise targets hostel conditions?
options: Push for a fixed water and light maintenance schedule in every hostel.
Build new hostels for every college.
questions.answer: Push for a fixed water and light maintenance schedule in every hostel.

questions.question: Which New Dawn promise is about skills training?
options: Run at least one free skill-acquisition bootcamp every semester.
questions.answer: Run at least one free skill-acquisition bootcamp every semester.

questions.question: Which New Dawn promise is about campus culture and recreation?
options: Bring back a proper sports and cultural calendar for all departments.
questions.answer: Bring back a proper sports and cultural calendar for all departments.

options: Together we rise. Together we shine.

questions.answer: Together we rise. Together we shine.
